violations.text: Salmon filet, tuna filet, and lobster meat were observed thawed in intact reduced oxygen packaging (ROP) in the prep unit and 1-door reach-in. Seafood items packaged within ROP packaging shall be completely removed from their original packaging prior to thawing to allow the reintroduction of oxygen into the food item. Food items were observed held at temperatures ranging from 39-41 degrees Fahrenheit and were voluntarily disposed of during the time of inspection. Proper thawing guidance provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the prep unit and 2-door reach-in units. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the prep unit and the 2-door reach-in cooler. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Establishment is to empty ice machine and thoroughly clean non-food contact surfaces. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
